test_output_summary: 41 tests passed in 0.06s. All test classes cover AC-001 through AC-010. Full suite: 549 passed, 1 pre-existing failure in test_scaffolding.py (unrelated to this task).
implementation_notes: Added ConfigDict(extra='ignore') to IntentCapability and ToolCapability models. Created abstract ManifestRegistry base class with abc.ABC and five abstract methods (register, deregister, get, find_by_intent, find_by_tool). Implemented InMemoryManifestRegistry using a dict[str, AgentManifest] store with fnmatch-based glob matching for find_by_intent. Updated __init__.py exports with ManifestRegistry and InMemoryManifestRegistry. Added factory functions to conftest.py for test data creation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `AgentManifest(agent_id="x", name="X Agent", template="basic")` instantiates with defaults
completion_promises.evidence: AgentManifest already accepted these three required fields. Tests verify instantiation with defaults (version='0.1.0', intents=[], tools=[], max_concurrent=1, status='ready', trust_tier='specialist', etc.). 7 tests in TestAgentManifestInstantiation class.

IntentCapability.confidence field uses Field(default=1.0, ge=0.0, le=1.0). Tests verify boundaries: 0.0 accepted, 1.0 accepted, 0.5 accepted, -0.1 rejected with ValidationError, 1.1 rejected with ValidationError, 5.0 rejected. 7 tests in TestIntentCapabilityConfidence.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `ManifestRegistry` is abstract — instantiating it directly raises `TypeError`
completion_promises.evidence: ManifestRegistry uses abc.ABC with 5 @abc.abstractmethod decorators (register, deregister, get, find_by_intent, find_by_tool). Test confirms ManifestRegistry() raises TypeError and verifies all 5 abstract methods in __abstractmethods__.

InMemoryManifestRegistry._store is a dict[str, AgentManifest]. register() stores manifest at _store[manifest.agent_id]. Tests verify register+get round-trip, multiple registrations, overwrite behavior, and get of unknown returns None.

deregister() uses self._store.pop(agent_id, None) which is a no-op for missing keys. Tests verify: deregister('unknown') does not raise, deregister existing key removes it, deregistering same key twice does not raise.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `InMemoryManifestRegistry.find_by_intent("software.build")` returns agents with matching intent pattern
completion_promises.evidence: find_by_intent uses fnmatch.fnmatch(intent, cap.pattern) for glob matching. Tests verify: exact match 'software.build', glob match 'software.*' matches 'software.build', non-matching pattern returns empty, multiple agents returned, empty registry returns empty, agent with multiple matching intents appears only once.

find_by_tool iterates all manifests checking tool.name == tool_name. Tests verify: matching tool found, non-matching tool returns empty, multiple agents with same tool returned, empty registry returns empty, agent with multiple tools appears once.

Added model_config = ConfigDict(extra='ignore') to IntentCapability and ToolCapability (AgentManifest already had it). Tests verify all three models ignore extra fields and confirm model_config['extra'] == 'ignore' via integration_contract test.
manifest.py has 'from __future__ import annotations' at line 13. Test uses AST parsing to verify the import exists in the module source file.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `manifest.py` does NOT import from `nats_core.events` (no circular dependency)
completion_promises.evidence: manifest.py imports only from __future__, abc, fnmatch, typing, and pydantic. No nats_core.events imports. Test uses AST parsing to verify no ImportFrom or Import nodes reference nats_core.events.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check on all 4 modified/created files (manifest.py, __init__.py, conftest.py, test_manifest.py) returns 'All checks passed!'. mypy --strict on manifest.py returns 'Success: no issues found'.
